title: adenia heterophylla subsp. andamanica
intro: Adenia heterophylla subsp. andamanica, also known as Andaman Globe Thistle, is a plant species belonging to the family Passifloraceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat various ailments due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Adenia heterophylla subsp. andamanica include its potential use in reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating pain. Herbal preparations of this plant can be used in the form of extracts or infusions, although further research is needed to fully understand its effectiveness and potential side effects.
